pages.text:
In case of reply she number and dale of thr letier should be ounted,

My Ref. No.

F0.20/148

Your Ref. No. ...

REPUBLIC OF GHANA

ANIMAL HEALTH DIVISION

Ministry of Agriculture

P.O. BOx M.161

Ministry Branch Post Office

Accra, Ghana 245 Mar,

.. 19?1

Dear Sir,

ILDUBERSHIP PO OI2

I have much pleasure in informing you that the

Minister of Agriculture has agproved that Ghana should enroll as a member of the Office Internationil des

Epizootics in category 6th. I would be very grateful if you would inform me, at your earliest convenience, what formalities wo hive making arrangements to send you our subscription for one yoar through the Ghana Enbassy in Paris.

Dr K.O. Gyening, Deputy Chief Veterintry Officer will be tha delegate for Ghana.

for: CHIER VETERINARY OFFICER

DR R. VITTOZ,

DIRECTOR, OFFICE INTERNATIONAL DES EPIZOOTICS,

12 RUE DE PRONY,

PARIS XVIIE.

LEed:

.

......415
